subject: Geography
chapter: The World Population Distribution, Density and Growth

formulas.name: Population Density
formulas.formula: Population Density = Total Population / Total Area
formulas.notes: To calculate the population density of a region

formulas.name: Population Growth Rate
formulas.formula: Population Growth Rate = (Birth Rate - Death Rate) / 10
formulas.notes: To calculate the rate at which the population is increasing

formulas.name: Birth Rate
formulas.formula: Birth Rate = (Number of Live Births / Total Population) * 1000
formulas.variables: Number of Live Births, Total Population
formulas.notes: To calculate the number of births per 1000 people

formulas.name: Death Rate
formulas.formula: Death Rate = (Number of Deaths / Total Population) * 1000
formulas.notes: To calculate the number of deaths per 1000 people

formulas.name: Sex Ratio
formulas.formula: Sex Ratio = (Number of Females / Number of Males) * 1000
formulas.variables: Number of Females, Number of Males
formulas.notes: To calculate the number of females per 1000 males

formulas.name: Dependency Ratio
formulas.formula: Dependency Ratio = (Population under 15 + Population over 64) / Total Population * 100
formulas.variables: Population under 15, Population over 64, Total Population
formulas.notes: To calculate the proportion of dependent population

formulas.name: Population Doubling Time
formulas.formula: Population Doubling Time = 70 / Population Growth Rate
formulas.notes: To calculate the time it takes for the population to double

formulas.name: Crude Density
formulas.formula: Crude Density = Total Population / Total Area
formulas.notes: To calculate the population density without considering the land use patterns

formulas.name: Physiological Density
formulas.formula: Physiological Density = Total Population / Agricultural Area
formulas.notes: To calculate the population density based on agricultural land

formulas.name: Agricultural Density
formulas.formula: Agricultural Density = Agricultural Population / Agricultural Area
formulas.notes: To calculate the density of agricultural population
